panels.title: All Contracts
panels.infobox: 📋 Complete contracts to earn silver and unlock the Contract Master achievement. No penalty for failure — accept freely. You need at least 1 day remaining when you deliver. **Save after completing each contract** for it to count.

entry_Contract.name: Kumersun (Tutorial)
entry_Contract.note: Tutorial only — skipped if you choose Skip Tutorial in NG+

entry_Contract.name: Ruvinheigen
entry_Contract.goods: Kumersun: Carp ×3, Diemoln: Soda Water ×3, Lamtra: Sulfur ×3, Graha: Wheat ×1 → Ruvinheigen

entry_Contract.name: Gahno A
entry_Contract.goods: Graha: Wheat ×1, Ulrich: Grapes ×1, Ruckiholk: Apple ×1, Delintskolz: Onion ×1 → Gahno
entry_Contract.note: Requires at least 40 days; not especially worth it

entry_Contract.name: Gahno B
entry_Contract.goods: Ahrmaln: Wool ×2, Bourattia: Cotton ×2, Delintskolz: Beer ×1, Lune: Egg ×2 → Gahno

entry_Contract.name: Liberkant
entry_Contract.goods: Erne: Milk ×1, Ruckiholk: Dried Fruit ×2, Bourattia: Cotton ×3 → Liberkant

entry_Contract.name: Lune / Bourattia
entry_Contract.goods: Delintskolz: Onion ×2, Liberkant: Crystal ×1, Ruckiholk: Dried Fruit ×2, Rossalt: Statue ×1 → Bourattia
entry_Contract.note: Contract destination is Bourattia despite being called Lune

entry_Contract.name: Diemoln / Delintskolz
entry_Contract.goods: Beorein: Oyster ×4, Ulrich: Clove ×1, Lune: Farm Tool ×3 → Delintskolz
entry_Contract.note: Requires 26 days. Overlaps perfectly with medicine quest route

entry_Contract.name: Leyage A
entry_Contract.goods: Ulrich: Wine ×1, Erne: Jerky ×3, Beorein: Mussel ×3 → drop off → Diemoln: Herring ×3, Lenos: Nutmeg ×1 → Leyage

entry_Contract.name: Lamtra
entry_Contract.goods: Leyage: Cotton Cloth ×2, Lenos: Wood ×2, Kumersun: Perry ×1 → drop off → Ulrich: Grapes ×2 → Lamtra

entry_Contract.name: Bourattia A / Lune
entry_Contract.goods: Bourattia: Saffron ×1, Gahno: Iron ×1 → drop off Lune → Delintskolz: Mead ×1, Erne: Pig ×1 → Lune
entry_Contract.note: All square items — requires 2 trips even at max cart size

entry_Contract.name: Delintskolz A / Diemoln
entry_Contract.goods: Lune: Egg ×1, Erne: Milk ×1, Beorein: Mussel ×2 → Diemoln

entry_Contract.name: Delintskolz B
entry_Contract.goods: Erne: Jerky ×1, Graha: Wheat Bread ×1 + Rye Bread ×1, Ruckiholk: Dried Fruit ×1, Rossalt: Sugar ×1, Bourattia: Honey ×1 → Delintskolz

entry_Contract.name: Lenos
entry_Contract.goods: Leyage: Green Pea ×3, Lamtra: Wool Cloth ×1, Poroson: Stone ×1, Kumersun: Pike ×2 → Lenos

entry_Contract.name: Leyage B / Diemoln
entry_Contract.goods: Kumersun: Char ×2, Ruvinheigen: Goldwork ×1, Liberkant: Weapon ×1, Erne: Goat ×1 → Diemoln

entry_Contract.name: Bourattia B ⭐
entry_Contract.goods: Beorein: Oyster ×1 + Mussel ×1, Diemoln: Shrimp ×1 + Herring ×1 + Caviar ×1, Kumersun: Pike ×1 + Carp ×1 → Bourattia
entry_Contract.note: Most profitable at +795 silver/day. Did not appear in Endless Mode. Contract must be found in-game to appear.
